validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv && python -m uv sync --extra dev --python /usr/bin/python3.12
validated_commands.notes: Use pip install uv (not curl install). Use python -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-06: 11 failed (7 policy_status ANSI + 4 runtime_factory LLM), 7578 passed.

coverage_baseline.notes: policy_status: 7 ANSI failures (pre-existing). runtime_factory: 4 failures (LLM not installed, PR #1139 pending). compile/cli.py: 49%, compile/watcher.py: 5%, deps/cli.py: 61%->improved, install.py: 81%.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
Main command logic still sparse. Lines 578-720 uncovered.
Helpers now covered (PR this run). update() orchestration lines 746-898 still sparse. Complex - needs heavy mocking.
7 tests failing: policy_status uses Rich unicode but test expects ASCII. PR #1029 closed by maintainer - do not retry.

Task3: Fixed 4 CI failures in test_runtime_factory.py - added skip markers for LLM-dependent tests. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.

Task3: Fix logic-replay anti-pattern. Task5: Commented on #768. Task7: Updated monthly issue #1101.
